ordersListPage.title: Orders
ordersListPage.activeDescription: Operational order list backed by live Prisma order data for payment, purchasing, warehouse, and shipping follow-up.
ordersListPage.trashDescription: Trash keeps removed orders recoverable. Restore here if an order was moved by mistake.

danger.markPaidDescription: Order {orderNo} will be marked as paid immediately after confirmation.
danger.restoreDescription: Order {orderNo} will be restored from trash and returned to the active order list.
danger.deleteDescription: Order {orderNo} will be deleted permanently. This cannot be undone and related admin records may be removed as part of cleanup.
danger.deleteBulkDescription: {count} selected orders will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone and related admin records may be removed as part of cleanup.
danger.trashDescription: Order {orderNo} will be moved into Trash and hidden from the active order list until restored.
danger.trashBulkDescription: {count} selected orders will be moved into Trash and hidden from the active order list until restored.

toolbar.selectForBulk: Select orders to bulk manage them.

feedback.searchPlaceholder: Search order no, user, country, assignee...

toasts.failedExportAll: Failed to export all order data.

orderLogs.title: Order Logs
orderLogs.description: Status changes, workflow actions, payment notes, refund actions, and admin operations linked to orders.

warehouseInbound.title: Warehouse Inbound
warehouseInbound.description: Orders and items that need warehouse receiving, partial receiving, inspection, or storage processing.

shippingRecords.title: Shipping Records
shippingRecords.description: Actual parcel dispatch records, tracking numbers, carriers, shipping fees, and delivery timestamps.

productCache.title: Product Cache
productCache.description: OneBound product detail cache used by product pages, carts, and historical order snapshots.

productImport.title: Import storefront products
productImport.description: Paste a single product URL or a Weidian shop URL. Imported products are written into Product Cache and can be published on the homepage and search catalog.
productImport.sourceHelp: Weidian shop links can import the first page or fetch every page in sequence. Single item links from supported platforms import one product.
productImport.importAllPages: For Weidian shop URLs, continue fetching next pages until the whole shop is imported
productImport.featureRowsHomepage: Feature imported rows on homepage by default

notes.single: Single product URL: fetches full detail, SKU, image and description.
notes.shop: Weidian shop URL: import the first page or turn on multi-page mode for the full shop.
notes.csv: CSV import: bulk import many product links in one shot.
notes.active: Imported products default to active storefront items.
notes.homepage: Homepage only shows up to 16 featured products; extra items stay visible in `/search`.

workflow.step1: 1. Import your Weidian shop or product URLs here.
workflow.step2: 2. Open Product Library to adjust homepage featured state and rank.
workflow.step3: 3. Visit homepage and `/search` to review the storefront output.

storefrontLibrary.title: Storefront Product Library
storefrontLibrary.description: Manage which imported products appear in your storefront. Homepage shows up to 16 featured products, while `/search` shows all active storefront products.
storefrontLibrary.empty: No storefront products yet. Import a product or your Weidian shop to begin.

productCategories.title: Product Categories
productCategories.description: Internal category map for restrictions, service notes, and shipping rule matching.

mediaLibrary.title: Media Library
mediaLibrary.description: WordPress-style server media management for homepage materials, content images, and order QC photos.

apiLogs.title: OneBound API Logs
apiLogs.description: Product URL parsing, keyword search, item_get, and gateway error records.
apiLogs.clearConfirmation: Clear all API logs? This cannot be undone.

marketingOverview.title: Affiliate Overview
marketingOverview.description: V1 affiliate dashboard for referral attribution, commission readiness, and campaign status.

affiliateUsers.title: Affiliate Users
affiliateUsers.description: Users with referral codes. Future versions can add affiliate levels, payout accounts, and approval workflow.

commissionRecords.title: Commission Records
commissionRecords.description: Commission records will become payable after affiliate rules and payout settings are enabled.

contentFaq.title: FAQ
contentFaq.description: FAQ entries are stored as help articles. Use Help Articles for full CKEditor editing.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.description: Announcement pages can be created in Pages and surfaced in the front-end content areas.

emailTemplates.title: Email Templates
emailTemplates.description: Email template management placeholder backed by current email logs. SMTP settings live under System Settings.

adminUsers.title: Admin Users
adminUsers.description: Administrator accounts. User role editing is available from User Center > Users.

rolesPermissions.title: Roles & Permissions
rolesPermissions.description: RBAC scaffolding for V1.0. Sidebar, admin API guards, and selected action buttons now use these role permissions.

operationLogs.title: Operation Logs
operationLogs.description: Structured audit trail for order, finance, shipping, settings, user, and permission operations.
operationLogs.clearConfirmation: Clear all operation logs? This cannot be undone.

currencySettings.title: Currency Settings
currencySettings.description: CNY is the product base currency. ExchangeRate-API refreshes CNY based conversion rates hourly and stores snapshots in the database.

table.title: Enabled Frontend Currencies
table.description: Rates show how much one CNY converts into the target currency.

sensitiveKeywords.title: Sensitive Keywords
sensitiveKeywords.description: Import restricted product terms, one keyword per line. Duplicates are ignored and the unique library is used to block risky searches and product pages.
sensitiveKeywords.pastePlaceholder:
One keyword per line
example: restricted term
